title: This is cool
author: dylanmccormick
body:
Just wanted to say this looks like a fun and cool project. 👍
A lot of fun to take a challenge head on like this. Rewrite it in go as they say. 



Feel free to close this issue.

title: make build-run with error?
author: ownerigor
body:
I'm using Ubuntu 25.04, I may have misunderstood, but should the command "make build-run" run "mcwig > /tmp/mcwig.panic.txt 2>&1"? It's giving me the following error:

title: Put it in a package manager
author: sdegutis
body: It's really good and I think it would be nice if we could install it through some package manager or something
